introSection: Kid Flash Cosmic Coaster is a steel single rail twin kiddie roller coaster that is currently standing but not operating at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened on November 4, 2023 to season passholders and members of the media. It opened to the public the following day.

In 2024, the ride closed indefinitely while Skyline Attractions worked with TÜV SÜD America on resolving issues with the ride. Six Flags Over Georgia later confirmed its closure on March 4, 2025. As of summer 2025, the ride remains standing but not operating.

fullText:
Kid Flash Cosmic Coaster is a steel single rail twin kiddie roller coaster that is currently standing but not operating at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA.

The ride opened on November 4, 2023 to season passholders and members of the media. It opened to the public the following day.

In 2024, the ride closed indefinitely while Skyline Attractions worked with TÜV SÜD America on resolving issues with the ride. Six Flags Over Georgia later confirmed its closure on March 4, 2025. As of summer 2025, the ride remains standing but not operating.
